markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games’ announcement of GTA VI’s delay to November 19, 2026, has extended the window for multiple high-profile events to resolve before launch, fueling trader interest in this multi-outcome market. The extended timeline—following prior shifts from 2025 and spring 2026—now encompasses potential music drops like Drake’s Iceman, geopolitical developments such as a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire, and tech milestones including GPT-6. Take-Two’s upcoming earnings calls and anticipated summer marketing push, possibly including an August trailer, serve as key catalysts that could shift sentiment around release stability and promotional momentum. Historical patterns show Rockstar prioritizing polish over speed, creating room for cultural and industry surprises to precede the title’s PS5 and Xbox Series X|S debut.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrials in Harvey Weinstein’s New York retrials—following the 2024 overturn of his original 23-year conviction—and ongoing appeals of his separate 16-year Los Angeles sentence have driven trader consensus toward No Prison Time at 77.8% implied probability. At 73 with documented health complications, Weinstein benefits from procedural wins that have repeatedly deadlocked juries and created pathways for reduced or vacated time, while the LA appeal remains unresolved. Guild and academy contexts from the #MeToo era show diminished momentum for maximum penalties amid shifting public sentiment. Key catalysts ahead include any fall sentencing on the remaining New York count and California appeal rulings, which could further shift the competitive landscape of outcomes.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs have reached the conference finals, where the Vegas Golden Knights, Carolina Hurricanes, Montreal Canadiens, and Colorado Avalanche remain alive, creating a tight cluster of implied probabilities as any outcome hinges on short series swings. Vegas has seized early momentum in the West with strong road performances against the Presidents' Trophy-winning Avalanche, while Montreal's Game 1 upset victory over Carolina in the East has injected volatility into the East bracket and lifted the Canadiens' standing. Carolina's regular-season dominance as the top Eastern seed and the Avalanche's league-leading point total provide foundational advantages, yet the wisdom of crowds in the market reflects the inherent unpredictability of playoff hockey, where injuries, goaltending variance, and home-ice shifts can rapidly alter paths to the final.

Vegas has seized early momentum in the West with strong road performances against the Presidents' Trophy-winning Avalanche, while Montreal's Game 1 upset victory over Carolina in the East has injected volatility into the East bracket and lifted the Canadiens' standing. Carolina's regular-season dominance as the top Eastern seed and the Avalanche's league-leading point total provide foundational advantages, yet the wisdom of crowds in the market reflects the inherent unpredictability of playoff hockey, where injuries, goaltending variance, and home-ice shifts can rapidly alter paths to the final.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spain and France sit atop the field as co-leaders in implied probability, reflecting their status as the most complete squads entering the expanded 48-team tournament. Spain’s status as reigning European champions, combined with depth across the pitch and strong UEFA qualifying results, underpins trader consensus, while France counters with elite attacking options and proven knockout pedigree. England’s perfect qualifying record and attacking firepower keep it within striking distance, as do Brazil and Argentina’s South American qualifying consistency. The tight clustering among these sides stems from comparable recent form, roster quality, and absence of major setbacks in the final buildup, leaving room for any to surge or fade based on group-stage execution and injury management.

markets.question: Will Japan win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping’s consolidated control over the Chinese Communist Party and Central Military Commission continues to underpin trader expectations that he will retain power through at least the end of 2026. Active leadership on the 15th Five-Year Plan rollout, energy security priorities, and domestic health initiatives has coincided with high-level diplomacy, including a May 2026 summit with the U.S. president and subsequent engagement with Russia, signaling stable authority without public indications of retirement, health concerns, or factional challenges. No designated successor has emerged ahead of the 2027 Party Congress, consistent with patterns of extended tenure once power centralization is achieved. These factors reinforce the market’s 93.5 percent implied probability for continuity.
